hungry.heading: Am I hungry?
hungry.prompt: What do I feel? How does my stomach feel? How does my head feel?
notes: Stomach hunger cues: empty feeling, grumbling
Low blood sugar cues: unfocused, tired, headache

bored_or_anxious.heading: If not hunger then what?
notes: I eat to self-soothe and to stimulate my senses.
I eat new foods because I want to try them.
I know that too many snacks are not good for my blood sugar

had_snacks_with_meal.heading: Snacks with meal?
had_snacks_with_meal.prompt: Did I have a snack with my last meal?
notes: Sweets after a full meal affect my blood sugar much less.
When I had sweets with my meal, I crave them less later.
The diet brain keeps repeating that people who eat dessert are disgusting losers.
I don't have to listen it anymore. I can live happy and balanced.

had_snacks_today.heading: Snacking day?
had_snacks_today.prompt: Have I already had snacks today?
notes: It's a difficult balance to limit sugar consumption without falling back into dieting restictions and demonizing foods that bring pleasure.
How many snacks have I had today?
How much sugar can my body process comfortably?
How am I going to feel physically after eating what I'm craving?

before_sleep.heading: Is it late?
before_sleep.prompt: Am I going to sleep in less than 4 hours?
notes: I have reflux.
I want to sleep well, protect my throat.

time_since_last_food.heading: Am I physically full?
time_since_last_food.prompt: When was the last time I ate? How many hours ago?
notes: When I haven't slept enough, I'm hugnry all day, no matter how much and how often I eat.
When I know I've eaten, it's OK to ingore hunger cues.

what_food_kind.heading: What did I eat?
what_food_kind.prompt: Did I have a full meal or just a snack?
notes: Sometimes I keep snacking instead of pausing for a proper meal.
Some meals don't keep me full for as long as others - panckakes or cereal fly through me

take_break.heading: Break time?
take_break.prompt: It's time to try those other ways to react to boredom or anxiety.
notes: Maybe I'm just thirsty? Let's have a glass of water and see how I feel.
When I'm frustrated r anxious, I tend to sit at my computer, hoping I can figue it out.
Then, I often end up on Reddit anyway. With chips, rarely a fruit.
I'm afraid I'll an imoprtant Slack message if I leave for 5 minutes.
Five minutes is nothing. I won't get fired. I can stand up, stretch, walk around, hug Olsi, pet Rosie.

have_snack.heading: Have a snack!
have_snack.prompt: I'll have a snack. I know what's good for my body.
notes: What do I feel like having? What are my choices? Am I at home or at work?
Am I craving a juicy crunchy fruit or baby carrots?
Or a scrumtious chocolate bar or a cookie?
Or flavourful chips or jerky?

time_for_meal.heading: Meal time?
time_for_meal.prompt: Maybe it's time to take a break and have that lunch or dinner now?
notes: It's OK to eat lunch less than 4 hours after breakfast.
I know I'll keep snacking until I have proper lunch
I can have a pleasure food with my meal: chocolate for dessert or chips with my sandwich.

be_uncomfortable.heading: This might not be the best time to eat
be_uncomfortable.prompt: Am I willing to feel discomfort in this moment for my body's sake?
notes: I want my body to be healthy and lasting, whatever shape it is.
What do I need right now? Rest? Movement? Comfort? Distraction?
What can I do to meet those needs or to distract myself from the discomfort?
